special_mechanics.name: jet_pack
special_mechanics.description: RoboCop can fly using a jet pack ability, featured in the ZX Spectrum version and other platform segments

special_mechanics.name: hand_to_hand_combat
special_mechanics.description: Close-range melee combat mechanic included as one of five game segments

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview and development history but contains no quantitative physics parameters, movement values, or technical specifications for the SNES version. The game is a side-scrolling platform shooter with multiple gameplay styles. Specific mechanical details are not documented.
